title: oncidium incarum
intro: Oncidium incarum, also known as the Incarum orchid, is a species of orchid native to South America. Traditionally, Oncidium incarum has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Oncidium incarum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
